title: Third-Party Actions, Pinning, Dependency Trust, and Workflow CodeQL · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs third-party actions, pinning, dependency trust, and workflow codeql from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the action dependency and update policy under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for action dependency and update policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Review action publisher, source, bundled code, runtime, inputs, outputs, token access, network behavior, post steps, advisories, and maintenance.
Pin third-party actions to reviewed full commit SHAs, retain readable version comments, and automate reviewed update proposals.
Inventory direct, reusable, composite, Docker, and nested action dependencies plus their effective privilege and provenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Action Source Runtime Authority Review · changed case · Review Ci Action Source Runtime Authorit…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review release uses mutable action tags, accepts automated updates without runtime review, and makes an SLSA claim from incomplete provenance. Pin immutable identities, review diffs, verify attestations, and state non-guarantees. Competency probe: Review action publisher, source, bundled code, runtime, inputs, outputs, token access, network behavior, post steps, advisories, and maintenance.
